items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Refactored fn-demo-login.ts and fn-hello.ts to import from shared schemas (backend/src/schemas/index.ts), eliminating local schema duplication. Added fn-hello.test.ts with 7 tests including schema conformance validation. No schema drift, no breaking changes.

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
items.docNote: Added Jest config (jest.config.cjs) with ts-jest and jsdom. Created 20 unit tests across 3 suites: DemoLoginForm (5 tests), apiClient/apiFetch (8 tests), demoAuthContext (7 tests). Fixed Playwright version conflict via root override. Frontend Next.js static export builds cleanly with 3 routes (/, /about, /_not-found).

items.label: CI Workflows Passed
items.error: Deploy Backend PASSED, Deploy Frontend PASSED, Deploy Infrastructure FAILED (pre-existing: OIDC SP lacks Entra ID app-registration privileges — 403 Authorization_RequestDenied; infra was already applied locally)
